_meta.author: kokonutd
_meta.title: Pricing Cards
_meta.description:
A responsive pricing cards component with customizable tiers, features, and dark mode support.

Features
- Responsive grid layout (1 column on mobile, 2 columns on desktop)
- Dark mode support
- Customizable pricing tiers
- Highlighted tier support
- Animated hover effects
- Feature list with included/excluded states
- Customizable CTA buttons with link or click handler
- Gradient backgrounds for highlighted tiers
- Flexible styling through className props
